resources:
App Name Watchpoint
Displayed Strings Start Guide on Watch Welcome to Watchpoint. View All Guides. View Health Info. Daily Tasks Delete All Heart-rate Data. Heart-rate Data History Search… Send No Results. \nPlease try a different search.
concern_view Displayed Strings During the guide %s %s levels of stress were detected. This was detected on %s. Support is available for you. Continued stress like this can endanger you or your loved one. Find a Carer Help Centre near you. Find out about support plans from CarersUK. Browse Carers Trust\'s Scotland Page.
Placeholder Text Loading…
Image Alt Text Unfilled Favourite Icon Unfilled Daily Icon Back Button Icon Guide List Icon Health Data Icon Settings Icon Delete Icon Home Icon Heart-rate Concern Icon
